characters.Kaori: Female, 17, long black hair, delicate features, school uniform, often displays conflicted emotions, determined gaze.
characters.Mr_Ito: Male, 30s, short dark hair, kind eyes, wears formal teacher attire, appears thoughtful and reserved, conveys quiet dignity.
characters.Yuki: Male, 20s, dark hair, intense expression, business attire, haunted eyes, carries a sense of burdened responsibility, stoic posture.
